description: Phase WX-K.3 — available text-to-image models for the endproduct/image subtype. The dispatcher reads this to surface a model picker + cost confirm UI before firing. Costs are in mchatai.com/cloud compute tokens. Local providers (user's own API key) are free.

models.notes: Default. Fast (~3s), good photorealistic + illustrated coverage. Cheapest paid option.
More expensive but better at text-on-image and stylized illustration. Use when user mentions 'with text', 'logo', 'poster'.
Cheapest option. Good for artistic / illustrated subjects. Less reliable on photorealistic faces.
